purpose: Reference images for the Blender structure plus img2img richness pipeline. These are inspiration and pipeline evidence, not production-ready game assets.

references.note: Shows the core pipeline: simple 3D terrain bake becomes rich terrain through img2img.
Wide painterly alpine valley reference for macro terrain richness.
Top-down terrain reference for rivers, cliffs, banks, snow, and meadow detail.
Biome sampler reference for grassland, heath, chalk, frost, marsh, moor, ash, and blight terrain families.
Walk-cycle reference emphasizing body consistency, foot anchors, and frame count needs.
